issues.title: 熔斷解除條件仍是唯一即時部署阻塞點
issues.action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。
issues.next_action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。

issues.action: 更正則化: 增加 reg_alpha/reg_lambda; 減少 max_depth; 或減少特徵數

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane

issues.title: q15 exact support under minimum after semantic rebaseline while breaker is active (0/50)
issues.action: Treat legacy supported rows as reference-only: keep support_identity/regression_basis/legacy_supported_reference visible in probe/API/UI/docs, keep the current-live exact-support blocker open, and do not describe this as same-identity support regression unless the semantic signature matches.

issues.title: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。具體 window / alerts / feature shifts 只保留在 machine-readable summary 與 recent_drift_report artifact，避免 ISSUES.md / ROADMAP.md 被長篇 telemetry 污染。
